CustomObject.label: Adverse Action Config
CustomObject.description: Config-as-data for the ECOA / Regulation B (12 CFR 1002.9) adverse action notice: creditor identity, the federal oversight agency block, the verbatim anti-discrimination notice, and the principal-reason cap. Editable without a deployment so legal/compliance can keep the disclosure current (e.g. agency address changes) without a code release.
